name: Enchantress
description: You know what I love? Everything! Aiushtha, the Enchantress If the targeted unit is an enemy or a neutral creep, Enchantress brings it under her control and receives a portion of its experience bounty. Enchanted creeps have increased attack damage and max health. There is a certain limit of creeps that she can control.

abilities.name: Rabble-Rouser
abilities.description: All neutral creeps conditionally deals more damage to Enchantress' enemy units. The higher Enchantress' level, the greater the outgoing damage amplification value. All Enchantress' player-controlled units are affected by Rabble-Rouser as well.

abilities.name: Impetus
abilities.description: Enchants her own attack while activated, causing it to deal additional distance-based damage between Enchantress and the enemy target. The farther the target, the greater the damage.

abilities.name: Enchant
abilities.description: If the targeted unit is an enemy or a neutral creep, Enchantress brings it under her control and receives a portion of its experience bounty. Enchanted creeps have increased attack damage and max health. There is a certain limit of creeps that she can control. Grants Enchantress and her player-controlled units bonus attack range when attacking the debuff-affected enemy hero.

abilities.name: Nature’s Attendants
abilities.description: A cloud of wisps heals Enchantress and allied units nearby.

abilities.name: Sproink
abilities.description: Enchantress then launches Impetus of its corresponding level on a number of furthest enemy units. Applies of its corresponding ability level when acquired.

abilities.name: Little Friends
abilities.description: Grants True Sight over the unit-targeted enemy upon cast. The ability component is granted by an aura and is independent of the root component.

abilities.name: Untouchable
abilities.description: After attacking Aiushtha, most opponents are overwhelmed with guilt having attacked such a natural beauty.
